hero.badge: Version 3.4.0 — Simpler, smarter, faster, everything you need in one place
hero.title: Yusr
hero.subtitle: An integrated accounting software to manage your business
hero.description: A cloud-based accounting software that helps you manage your accounts, invoices, sales, and expenses with ease. It features a simple and flexible interface, allowing you to track your business from anywhere at any time, while ensuring the security and accuracy of your data.
